title: Update the version number we identify as to 0.1.
body: Adjust the order in which `--help` output lists commands to keep them sorted, and change our claimed version number to 0.1.

comments.body: We will be updating the actual spec file in Fedora/RHEL, so this is just an example.  But I see no reason not to update it.
